query:
SELECT l.nome, l.convenio, COUNT(c.id) as total_contatos
FROM crm_mailing_listas l
LEFT JOIN crm_mailing_contatos c ON c.listaId = l.id
GROUP BY l.id, l.nome, l.convenio
ORDER BY l.id;
